reasoning: The document exhibits strong text preservation with a composite fidelity score of 0.9727 and high programmatic text metrics. However, there are two major structural defects: an incorrectly split list spanning a page boundary and a full-page image left alongside extracted text. Following the routing rules for 1-5 major defects, this document requires human review to correct these structural and accessibility issues.

concerns.analysis: A bulleted list item that spans the boundary between page 2 and page 3 was split incorrectly. The first half of the item is correctly rendered as a list item at the end of page 2, but the continuation text at the top of page 3 is incorrectly extracted as a plain paragraph, falling outside the list structure, before the list resumes.
